_metadata.source: Texvin spinning markup baseline (April 2026 research) + Phase B fair evidence calibration
_metadata.unit: USD/kg added on top of upstream commodity benchmark price (USD/kg)

changelog.v1.1.0: Renamed filament bucket keys to match driver_inference output: polyester_filament_FDY -> polyester_fdy, polyester_filament_DTY -> polyester_dty, polyester_filament_POY -> polyester_poy, polyester_filament_GIPE removed (DTY bucket used). Added polyamide_fdy bucket.

notes: Markups are family-specific; subfamily/spinning system/ply adjustments are multipliers.
Final yarn price = upstream_benchmark_price (USD/kg) + family_base_markup * adjustments.
Re-calibrate quarterly against Tier 1 Turkish quote evidence (sheet).
When evidence diverges >25% from this model, flag for manual review.
Modal proxy: rayon_yarn benchmark + 0.20 USD/kg (modal_premium) BEFORE markup.
Recycled: virgin commodity benchmark + recycled_premium (0.30-0.50 USD/kg) BEFORE markup.

fiber_premium_over_benchmark._doc: Premium added to upstream benchmark BEFORE spinning markup. Used for proxy mappings.

family_base_markup._doc: Base spinning markup per fiber family / driver_slug (USD/kg). Applied as f(spinning_system, ply, count).

modal_staple._note: Slight premium over viscose markup due to processing complexity

polyester_staple._note: Polyester staple yarn (post-spinning); distinct from FDY/POY/DTY filament

polyamide_staple._note: Small market, limited evidence. Confidence: low.

polyester_fdy._doc: FDY = Fully Drawn Yarn, post-extrusion finished filament. Default for polyester filament without specific suffix (incl. PA6.6 HT tire cord rerouted via filament fallback).

polyester_dty._doc: DTY = Draw Textured Yarn (texturized FDY). Also covers GIPE/Air Covered Yarn variant (DTY base + lycra integration overhead, ~0.20 implicit).

polyamide_fdy._doc: Polyamide filament default bucket. Covers PA6/PA66 generic FDY and HT tire cord variants.
polyamide_fdy._note: Higher than polyester_fdy due to chip cost differential

pv_blend_staple._note: Weighted PES/VIS markup; weighted-avg upstream computed in code

three_component_staple._note: Premium over 2-component due to processing complexity

corespun_staple._note: Includes ~0.40 elastane integration premium over base ring spun

recycled_polyester_staple._doc: Same markup base as polyester_staple; the recycled premium is applied in fiber_premium_over_benchmark (added to upstream price BEFORE this markup).

recycled_blend_staple._doc: Mirrors cotton_blend_staple structure (most recycled blends are cotton-anchored).

spec_adjustments._doc: Multiplicative adjustments to family_base_markup. Applied in this order: ply -> compact -> combed -> color -> specialty. Compounded.

count_band_modifier._doc: Count-based markup modifier. Finer counts (higher Ne) cost more per kg due to more spinning passes.
